metadata.description: Cross-platform model catalog for cinematic style production. Covers image and video generation models from kie.ai and fal.ai with current pricing and API details.

kie_ai.name: Kie.ai
kie_ai.description: Unified API gateway for AI models (image, video, audio). Generally 30-70% cheaper than competitors.

nano_banana_2.name: Nano Banana 2 (Google Gemini 3.1 Flash 4K)
nano_banana_2.description: Fast, high-quality image generation with 4K support
nano_banana_2.use_case: Primary for all styles needing static images

nano_banana_pro.name: Nano Banana Pro (Google Gemini 3.0 Pro)
nano_banana_pro.description: Advanced image generation with editing capabilities
nano_banana_pro.use_case: Higher quality variant when precision is critical

flux_ai.name: Flux AI
flux_ai.description: Black Forest Labs image model with vivid, coherent scenes

veo_3_fast.name: Veo 3 Fast (Google DeepMind)
veo_3_fast.description: Fast Google video generation at lower cost

veo_3_quality.name: Veo 3 Quality (Google DeepMind)
veo_3_quality.description: Higher-quality video generation with improved coherence

kling_2_1_pro.name: Kling 2.1 Pro
kling_2_1_pro.description: Kling video generation at 1080p with enhanced realism

seedance_1_5_pro.name: Seedance 1.5 Pro
seedance_1_5_pro.description: ByteDance video generation with audio support

seedance_2_0.name: Seedance 2.0
seedance_2_0.description: ByteDance multimodal video generation with audio sync
seedance_2_0.availability: SUSPENDED as of March 15, 2026 (Hollywood copyright suspension)

fal_ai.name: Fal.ai
fal_ai.description: GPU-accelerated API platform for image and video generation. Strong performance on video models.

nano_banana_2.name: Nano Banana 2 (Google Gemini 3.1 Flash 4K)
nano_banana_2.description: Fast Google image generation with 4K support
nano_banana_2.use_case: Primary for all styles needing static images

nano_banana_pro.name: Nano Banana Pro (Google Gemini 3.0 Pro)
nano_banana_pro.description: Advanced image generation with commercial rights

flux_kontext_pro.name: Flux Kontext Pro
flux_kontext_pro.description: Advanced image generation with context awareness

seedance_2_0.name: Seedance 2.0 (Coming Soon)
seedance_2_0.description: ByteDance multimodal video generation with audio sync
seedance_2_0.use_case: Multi-shot narrative generation with native audio

video_generation.recommendation: Use kie.ai for all Veo 3 work
Use kie.ai Kling 2.1 Pro for best value

style_01_archival_bw_documentary.workflow: Generate image → post-process to grayscale + grain in Remotion

style_02_3d_animated_synthetic.workflow: Generate with '3D render' style parameter → clean up in Figma if needed

style_03_satellite_map_visualization.workflow: Generate map visualization → add Remotion overlays for depth markers

style_04_hd_underwater_camera.workflow: Generate video with underwater/cinematic prompt → add SFX in Suno → composite in Remotion

style_05_national_geographic_wildlife.workflow: Generate creature images with wildlife cinematography prompt → optionally extend to video with Veo 3

style_06_scientific_infographic.workflow: Generate clean graphic design → add text/labels in Remotion (never in image model)

notes.seedance_2_0_suspension: Seedance 2.0 API access was suspended on March 15, 2026 across kie.ai, WaveSpeed, and BytePlus International due to Hollywood copyright concerns. Use Seedance 1.5 Pro as fallback.
notes.platform_recommendation: For 2026 production, kie.ai is the primary platform—30-70% cheaper than fal.ai on most models. Use fal.ai only for models unavailable on kie.ai (e.g., Wan 2.5).
notes.image_first_workflow: All styles use image generation as the foundation. Video is extended from images via image-to-video models.
notes.audio_sync: Narration extracted with timestamps → beat_sheet.json → visuals scheduled against beat map. Never use model-generated voiceover; use ElevenLabs TTS only.
notes.cost_optimization: For high-volume production, use Nano Banana 2 on kie.ai ($0.04/image at 1K). For final hero shots, upgrade to Veo 3 Quality on kie.ai ($0.25/sec).
